description: List, read, write, and delete objects in an OCI Object Storage bucket.

tools.description: List, read, write, or delete objects in an OCI Object Storage bucket (resource-principal auth). Use to read or persist files and artifacts an agent works with.

schema.name: operation
schema.description: One of: list, get, put, delete.

_confDescriptions.bucket: Object Storage bucket NAME. OCI Console -> Storage -> Object Storage -> Buckets.
_confDescriptions.namespace: OCI Object Storage namespace (auto-detected if blank). OCI Console -> top-right -> Tenancy info -> Namespace.
_confDescriptions.region: OCI region. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json. (e.g. us-ashburn-1)
_confDescriptions.prefix: Optional object name prefix filter for list operations (e.g. 'logs/2026/').
_confDescriptions.max_keys: Max objects returned by list operation (default 200).
_confDescriptions.max_bytes: Cap on response/file bytes; returns truncated:true when hit.
_confDescriptions.max_retries: Max retry attempts for transient OCI Object Storage errors (default 3).
